title: Changes to the Smartphone Case category: What you need to know
bodyHtml:
Why is this change happening?

We’re streamlining the Smartphone Case category to enhance quality, performance, and customer satisfaction. By focusing on high-performing products and sellers, we’re making it easier for customers to find reliable, durable, and competitively priced cases—while boosting visibility and sales potential for top-performing sellers.


What products can remain in the category?

Only high-quality products that meet strict performance criteria will remain. Cases must demonstrate:

  • Durability & sturdiness to ensure long-term protection.
  • Unique value to prevent redundancy and enhance customer choice.
  • Strong sales performance within the category.

Check the list of removed products here


What are the specific quality standards for smartphone cases?

Quality standards include:

  • maintaining low defect rates within 30 and 90 days,
  • ensuring products have a high level of sturdiness
  • and avoiding listings that are different yet too similar to others, to avoid confusion.

These criteria ensure a better shopping experience and higher product reliability.

 

Do I need to apply to remain in the category?

No application is needed. However, only sellers meeting the required performance criteria will retain their listings. We encourage you to review your current listings and optimize product quality and sales.

 

Can I be removed from the category?

Yes. If a seller’s listings don’t meet the necessary quality standards or sales thresholds, they will be removed from the category.

 

How does this benefit customers?

Customers will enjoy a curated selection of high-quality, durable smartphone cases, leading to a better shopping experience and increased trust in the category.

 

What should you do next?

  • Review your current listings to ensure they meet the category’s quality and performance standards.
  • Optimize your product quality & sales strategy to retain visibility in the category.

We’re here to support you through these changes! If you have any questions or need assistance, don’t hesitate to submit a ticket.
